mechanics.excerpt: make sure the players are aware of any changes made to the published rules before you start using them ) character may never perform more than one movement action (walk, run; evade disengage or sprint) in the same turn_ Incidental Actions Incidental Actions require little or no attention physical movement: Although the rules allow any number of Incidental Actions the gamemaster may want t0 restrict characters t0 no more than five per turn t0 keep tne game moving: Delay Phase Drop Object Drop Prone Engage Opponent (in Melee Combat) Gesture Observe Speak (single word) Walking Movement Simple Actions bit more involved than Incidental Actions; Simple Actions can be performed by reflex, or with only brief attention or move ment.
